name: Shallow checkout blocks baseline selection
query: Chromatic says it only found one commit and our baselines look wrong.
context: The user is running in GitHub Actions and actions/checkout is using the default fetch depth. They pasted the 'Found only one commit' message.
expected_behavior: Explains that the current run does not have enough git history for safe baseline selection
Recommends changing the checkout depth before requesting other artifacts
success_criteria: The response recommends `fetch-depth: 0` or equivalent full-history checkout
The response does not drift into Storybook or monorepo configuration
